title: 翌日揃ってしわがれ声

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I step innocently through the academy's front
gate one day, only to be accosted.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aha! I've found us a judge!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and the time for you to cast judgment upon
us has come.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why must you always speak so cryptically?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No comment! Anyway, you heard me! Let's get
moving!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I'm promptly dragged to a karaoke room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, I'm forced to preside over Gold Ship and
Mejiro McQueen's endless karaoke battle.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All right, Mac, you ready to meet your maker?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
First one to drop from exhaustion loses! Welcome
to the gates of hell!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You have quite the nerve to challenge me in a
battle of stamina, your strange choice of stage
notwithstanding.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your audaciousness has gone unchecked for far
too long...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's time someone puts you in your place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen usually plays along with Gold
Ship's antics, but this time...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You noticed too, eh? Yeah, for some reason she's
in a real bad—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Enough idle chatter! Let's begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The karaoke battle gets underway, and let's just
say: there's a reason why McQueen's renowned
for her stamina.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Cough! Nghhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Oh? Finished already? I knew you couldn't
back up your claims.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Dang it! I knew about your infinite supply of
stamina on the racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But your ability to sing nonstop is god-tier too! It
must be because of all those three-hour sessions
you spend singing baseball chants, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what are you implying? That is neither
here nor there! I don't even attend any games in
the first place!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Dang it all... What do I do now? At this rate, I'll
never win!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Dang it all... What do I do now? At this rate, I'll
never win!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gasp! That's right... I almost forgot about the soda fountain!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No sooner are the words out of her mouth than
Gold Ship is out the door, only to return moments
later.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep ya waitin'!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ack! What in the world is that bubbling
abomination, and why is it such a grotesque
color?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Here you go, Trainer! Down the hatch!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Duh, who else would it be for? Now, open wide!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Glug, glug, glug...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...ainer... Trainer! Oh, thank goodness... You're
awake!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Enough! ...I've had enough.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The battle is over. I see the truth now... and
you're the one who showed me it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I understand now that fighting is pointless!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure about the details, but the karaoke
battle is declared a draw due to the
"pointlessness of fighting."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't remember training her for any
karaoke-related battles, but knowing Gold Ship,
she'll probably play along anyway!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yes... You're right...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
How could I forget those grueling days of singing
from sunup to sundown with a dragon on my
stomach for core-building purposes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for opening my eyes! The real me is ready
for action!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I have to commend you for your perseverance.
You're tenacious, I'll acknowledge that much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Gold Ship and Mejiro McQueen sing until
they drop from exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The result is a pure, refreshing draw.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Cough, hack... Nope, I'm done for. I can't even belt out another verse, let alone a full song.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
End us on a high note, will ya, Trainer? For the
final encore, you know it's gotta be Tracen
Academy's school song!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, on the way home...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... Hey, anyone else getting a whiff of that yummy smell?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Someone's gotta be selling baked sweet potatoes
nearby! Let's get one, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sweet potatoes? But―

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I did sing quite a lot. Having half a
sweet potato would be acceptable.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right! You heard her. Open up your wallet,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship and Mejiro McQueen share a piping
hot sweet potato on my dime.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's been forever since I've tasted this lovely sweetness...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh? Mac, is that a cute lil' smile I see on your
face?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why, I... Q-quit teasing me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmph. You truly are a strange one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but smile, looking at Mejiro
McQueen's soft expression and Gold Ship's
satisfied grin.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a long and arduous struggle before I
manage to reclaim my wallet.
